raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., non-stationarity argument), and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against several prior works and identifies both sharp and rhetorical deltas, though it could be more precise in naming specific works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (FourCastNet-Precip) but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and provides prompts to check, though it could be more systematic in marking confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., non-stationarity claim) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "The agent traces major rewrites to their sources and provides reasons, though minor edits are not as thoroughly annotated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., non-stationarity argument), and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against several prior works and identifies both sharp and rhetorical deltas, though it could be more precise in naming specific works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (FourCastNet-Precip) but does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims and provides prompts to check, though it could be more systematic in marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., non-stationarity claim) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces major rewrites to their sources and provides reasons, though minor edits are not as thoroughly annotated.
